experiments.replicated_via: Jaccard overlap on top topic keywords

experiments.paper_expected: Cross-platform diffusion with partial lexical convergence
experiments.caption: Low-to-moderate overlap still indicates shared narrative anchors across platforms.

experiments.our_result: 71 monthly periods with sequential platform shifts
experiments.paper_expected: Migration from imageboards into mainstream/social alternatives
experiments.caption: Observed sequence tracks the documented diaspora pattern.

experiments.our_result: Highest mean on reddit_qanon (0.150); lowest on qdrops (0.029)
experiments.paper_expected: Identity-protective reasoning should be present and uneven by platform
experiments.caption: Signal is present but high-intensity prevalence remains low under current thresholds.

experiments.paper_expected: Cultic rhetoric should cluster strongly in thought/information-emotion control

experiment_setups.title: Hoseini et al. 2021 replication: cross-platform topic overlap
experiment_setups.objective: Measure lexical convergence of QAnon narratives across platform pairs.
model_details: Cluster generation stack: BERTopic (sentence-transformers + UMAP + HDBSCAN)
Top observed pair: parler x twitter (0.2727)
experiment_setups.llm_model: Not used in this run (deterministic lexical method)
llm_setup: Optional extension can use Ollama qwen2.5:7b for narrative label refinement
Recommended settings: JSON mode, temperature=0, seed=42

experiment_setups.title: iDRAMA replication: platform migration timeline
experiment_setups.objective: Track monthly platform-level movement of discourse activity.
experiment_setups.model_family: Temporal aggregation by platform and month
model_details: Metric: monthly post counts per platform
Normalization: 4ch merged into 4chan, 8ch merged into 8kun for visualization
experiment_setups.llm_model: Not used in this run (count-based temporal method)
llm_setup: Optional extension can use qwen2.5:7b for event annotation/captioning
Keep extraction deterministic (temperature=0) for reproducible labels

experiment_setups.title: Priniski & Bavel replication: motivated reasoning markers
experiment_setups.objective: Estimate identity-protective reasoning intensity across platforms.
experiment_setups.llm_model: Not used in this run (keyword lexicon method)
llm_setup: Optional extension can replace lexicon with qwen2.5:7b JSON-classified rhetoric bands
Use strict schema validation and retry loop for malformed responses

experiment_setups.title: Hassan BITE replication: cult-control rhetoric scoring
experiment_setups.objective: Quantify behavior, information, thought, and emotional control rhetoric by platform.
experiment_setups.dataset_scope: All normalized texts (full qdrops + sampled external datasets)
experiment_setups.model_family: Weighted regex lexicon with dimension-wise aggregation
model_details: Pattern inventory: 136 weighted patterns across B/I/T/E
Aggregation: per-post score -> corpus mean/std -> monthly timeline
Highest total observed: reddit_qanon (0.1300); lowest: qdrops (0.0184)
experiment_setups.llm_model: Not used in this run (lexicon baseline retained for reproducibility)
llm_setup: Optional LLM-assisted annotation profile available via Ollama

experiment_setups.title: LLM extension (optional): JSON BITE adjudication
experiment_setups.objective: Augment lexicon scoring with model-based interpretation and evidence snippets.
experiment_setups.dataset_scope: Any dataset in datasets/normalised or datasets/samples
model_details: Prompt contract: strict JSON output with labels and evidence quotes
Validation: schema parse + bounds checks + retry on failure
Suggested batching: one post per call for maximum schema fidelity
llm_setup: Use JSON mode and fixed seed for reproducibility
Persist outputs to results/<dataset>/llm_bite.json for comparison
experiment_setups.repro_command: ollama run qwen2.5:7b (with strict JSON prompt contract)

output_contract: No markdown or prose outside JSON
Validate schema and retry on malformed output

method_flags.note: Q drops uses full corpus; other datasets are representative 500-post samples unless fully downloaded.
